---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement for Strata
title: '[Feature] '
labels: feature-request
assignees: jonathjan0397
---

## Summary
A clear, one-line description of the feature you're requesting.

## Problem it solves
What problem or friction does this address? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution
Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives considered
Have you seen this done well in another platform? Link or describe.

## Additional context
Screenshots, mockups, or anything else that helps illustrate the request.

---

> **Prefer email?** Send feature requests directly to [Jonathan.r.covington@gmail.com](mailto:Jonathan.r.covington@gmail.com)
